rulings.Case Title: VERONICA TEDESCHI et al VS. THE METROPOLITAN FRESH START HOUSE, A CALIFORNIA
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION To Strike The Proof Of Service Of The 3-Day Notice Attached To The 1st Amended Complt For Unlawful Detainer
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, August 9, 2012, line 2. DEFENDANT THE METROPOLITAN FRESH START HOUSE's MOTION To Strike The Proof Of Service Of The 3-Day Notice Attached To The First Amended Complaint For Unlawful Detainer. Motion to Strike denied, 1) Notice of Motion does not correspond to and is not supported by Points and Authorities, 2) No authority that non compliance with Business and Professions provisions render Proof of Service subject to Motion to Strike CCP 436; 3) No showing Michael Ewing subject to the cited Business and Professions sections. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SILVIO OCAMPO VS. ALBERT FIORELLA et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, August 9, 2012, line 3. DEFENDANT ALBERT FIORELLA's Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment. Hearing required to explain how he learned of fling of action if not served. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DHIREN GADARIYA VS. TOMMY HART et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Quash Service Of Summons; Memorandum Of Points & Authorities; Proof Of Service
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, August 9, 2012, line 4. DEFENDANTs TOMMY HART and VELMA CARTER's Motion To Quash Service Of Summons. Grant, opposing party fails to provide competent evidence that defendants were properly served. = (501/REQ)
